summary: Iter 5 — Cream + Sage palette + Playfair Display heading switch. Backend 22/22 PASS (no backend changes; existing tests still green: signup/login/me/google-session/profile incl bio+picture+413, requests CRUD, chat normal+emergency+history+empty, find-help, dashboard, settings). Frontend visual + functional regression all PASS. Palette: full DOM sweep of Home (592 nodes), Profile (167 nodes), Dashboard (375 nodes) all show 0 pure rose (#E11D48) and 0 pure amber (#F59E0B). Sage #6B8E7F appears on 132 elements (Home), tan #D9B89C on 51. Heading font on Login/Home/FindHelp/Dashboard all confirmed as 'Playfair Display, ui-serif, Georgia, serif' on h1/h2/h3; body font remains 'Plus Jakarta Sans'. Login: tab-login + tab-signup + auth-email + auth-password + auth-submit + google-login-btn all visible; sage→tan gradient sign-in pill rendered as expected. Navbar (post-login): top-navbar, profile-chip, logout-btn, nav-home, nav-chat, nav-find, nav-dashboard, nav-profile ALL visible (note: testid is nav-find not nav-find-help — was correctly named in code; spec listed nav-find-help which is a doc-only mismatch). Home: all 6 cat-* testids present (food/medical/financial/shelter/mental/education); request-help-section + request-help-cta-section visible; floating-ai-btn visible and navigates to /chat. Find Help: query 'urgent food assistance for elderly' + New York returns 6 org-card + 6 org-share-btn; urgency-badge color = rgb(194,72,58) = #C2483A (warm-red) with 10%-alpha pastel bg, text 'HIGH urgency'; per-card URGENT red pills visually confirmed via screenshot (6 cards, white-on-warm-red). Dashboard: 'Urgency mix' HIGH bar uses #C2483A (warm-red, 15 occurrences in palette sweep), 'Need distribution' bar uses sage; chart palette correctly remapped. Profile: avatar-edit visible, bio fill→save→reload→persist verified ('Iter5 cream-sage palette test bio'). 0 console errors across all flows.

issues: Warm-red #C2483A is still clearly red and visually distinguishable (red color + soft pastel red tint behind badge) but is noticeably softer than prior #DC2626 — matches user's brief to feel less harsh while preserving urgency cue. Adequate contrast on white card backgrounds and on the 10%-alpha badge bg.

action_items: [OPTIONAL/LOW] Spec text in this iter mentioned testid 'nav-find-help' but code uses 'nav-find'. Either update spec or rename to 'nav-find-help' for consistency (everything else aligns).
critical_code_review_comments: tailwind.config.js: Sage Linen palette is well-organized — sage(#6B8E7F)/terracotta(#D9B89C)/urgent(#C2483A)/success(#5B8A75)/cream(#F7F3ED)/silver(#D9DEDC) with shadow + ring tokens; class-name keys (sage/terracotta) preserved to avoid touching every consumer — clean migration strategy.

index.css: Heading font correctly set to Playfair Display only on h1/h2/h3 + .font-display; body Plus Jakarta Sans preserved per user request. Gradient text uses sage→tan→blush. Urgent pill kept #C2483A, success pill repurposed to sage #5B8A75 — palette consistent throughout.

Find Help urgency-badge & per-card URGENT pills correctly use warm-red #C2483A (rgb(194,72,58)). Dashboard 'Urgency mix' chart HIGH bar also uses #C2483A — palette is consistent across data viz and badges.
No leftover #E11D48 (rose-600) or #F59E0B (amber-500) anywhere in the rendered DOM (verified via 3-page sweep covering 1134 elements). Global hex remap was complete.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, navbar, home, find-help w/ HIGH urgency, dashboard, profile bio persist, FAB→chat all green)

test_credentials: test@example.com / Pass1234! (seeded). Backend tests also create signup+<ts>@example.com per run.
seed_data_creation: Profile bio of test@example.com was overwritten to 'Iter5 cream-sage palette test bio' during persistence verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Palette is now Cream + Sage + soft tan blush + warm-red #C2483A + silver glow accent. Heading font: Playfair Display (h1/h2/h3 + .font-display). Body font: Plus Jakarta Sans. Verified with full-DOM color sweeps across Home/Profile/Dashboard — zero rose/amber residue. Backend untouched. Navbar testid for Find Help is 'nav-find' (NOT 'nav-find-help'). Find Help submit button testid is 'find-submit'; need input 'find-need'; location input 'find-location'. Profile bio testid 'profile-bio', save testid 'profile-save'. To retrigger urgency-badge in Find Help you must submit a query (default page shows 'Ready when you are' empty state).
rca of the issue: No issues. Palette + heading font swap was clean and complete; all prior testids preserved; functional regression and visual verification both pass.
